'''F-3PO''' was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] in [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. When [[X0-X1]] took control of the city, F-3PO was forced to [[Death/Legends|kill]] [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Issan Len]], despite its regrets.<ref name="CoCC" />

{{Char-stub}}
